<includeonly><div class="verification-box verification-{{{status}}}">{{#switch:{{{status}}}
| complete = &#x1F7E2;
| in-progress = &#x1F7E1;
| not-started = &#x1F534;
| issues = &#x26A0;&#xFE0F;
| #default = &#x2753;
}} '''{{#switch:{{{status}}}
| complete = Verified
| in-progress = In Progress
| not-started = Not Started
| issues = Issues Identified
| #default = Unknown
}}'''{{#if:{{{note|}}}|<span class="verification-note"> — {{{note}}}</span>}}{{#if:{{{last_verified|}}}|<div class="verification-meta">Last verified: {{{last_verified}}}</div>}}{{#if:{{{sources|}}}|<div class="verification-meta">Sources: {{{sources}}}</div>}}</div></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<pre>
{{Verification|status=in-progress
|note=Structural and civil extracted. Mechanical pending submittals.
|last_verified=2026-02-15
|sources=C-301 through C-310 (Rev 3), Spec 03 30 00}}
</pre>

=== Status values ===
* '''complete''' — High confidence, directly extracted from source documents
* '''in-progress''' — Partially extracted, some sections pending
* '''not-started''' — Page exists but content not yet verified against sources
* '''issues''' — Contradictions or problems found requiring resolution

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
